case_title: MANUEL SEOANE VS. CUNHA INTERNATIONAL, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF THE GREEN CARD WAS REMOVED FROM ENVELOPE AND RETURNED TO COURT ON 10/31/16.
